base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ending — a ui (cutscene) from 1993 mega man x. Ending cutscene — X rides into sunset, Zero-reveal. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
